# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `BI-260009`
- Title: `Deliver multilingual site experience for English, Dutch, and Portuguese`
- Requirement: [`FR-009`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260009.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Site visitor who prefers English, Dutch, or Portuguese when evaluating services and deciding whether to make contact`
- Value statement: `For prospective clients and partners, offer the site in their preferred language to improve clarity, trust, and conversion confidence.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `A language switcher is present in the shared header and works consistently across the site.`
  - `Home, Projects, About Me, and Contact each have English, Dutch, and Portuguese versions.`
  - `Changing language keeps the user on the same logical page whenever possible.`
  - `Localized titles, descriptions, and hreflang/SEO metadata are emitted per language.`
  - `The solution remains static-first and passes formatting, lint, and build verification.`
- Dependencies: `FR-005 visual baseline; FR-006 shared navigation behavior; QR-001 quality checks; OR-001 deployment verification.`
- Validation approach: `Manual route/language switching checks plus format, type, and production build verification.`
- Priority score: `73`
- Target window: `Phase 2`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/REQ-FR-260009.md`](../requirements/REQ-FR-260009.md)
  - ADR: `adr/ADR-260006.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
